curation_method: One symbol (Box) hand-curated against the pinned SHA. Remaining stubs need ground truth curation followed by second-pair-of-eyes verification per tests/coverage/CONVENTIONS.md.
caveats: Protocol-default-implementation witnesses are out of scope for v1.1.x. TCA makes heavy use of macros and protocol-oriented design, so ground truth here should flag any site where we deliberately omitted witnesses in `excluded_ranges` below.
Macro-generated call sites are the LSP reconciliation layer's job. Ground truth records only what indexstore can reach; LSP-only ranges land under the yellow-lsp-only tier at runtime.
Stub entries keep `needs_verification: true`. Flip to false only after a reviewer has inspected the checkout and confirmed the expected_ranges are exhaustive for the symbol.

symbols.description: Internal helper type with exactly two source occurrences in the pinned tree: its own declaration in Internal/Box.swift and a single generic instantiation inside Core.swift. Picked as the first verified TCA fixture entry because it's unreachable from macros and public API, so renaming it exercises the planner's plain-identifier path without macro noise.

STUB — needs ground truth curation against the pinned TCA checkout. Left as an empty-expected-ranges sentinel so the harness builds + resolves the USR but treats the coverage number as informational until filled in.
